title: Kessler Sandbox
description: Educational sandbox showing how debris growth can increase conjunction pressure across an orbital shell.
summary: Kessler Sandbox fixture ready for education mode. It provides stable debris-growth timeline IDs for future visualization.

events.title: Stable shell baseline
events.description: The sandbox starts with a simple orbital shell and low aggregate risk.

events.title: Debris injection
events.description: A simulated breakup injects debris into nearby paths.

events.title: Risk pressure rises
events.description: The worklist grows as more close approaches enter watch and warning bands.
